summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Scrabit E-Kabbadiwala service. All backend APIs working correctly, frontend UI components functional, complete booking flow operational, and tracking system integrated properly.
passed_tests: Backend API - Root endpoint (/api/)
Backend API - Pricing data retrieval (/api/pricing)
Backend API - Impact statistics (/api/impact)
Backend API - Booking creation (/api/bookings)
Backend API - Booking retrieval by ID
Backend API - Booking tracking by phone
Backend API - Contact form submission
Backend API - Invalid booking ID handling (404)
Frontend - Landing page loads with all sections (Hero, How It Works, Why Scrabit, Impact Stats, Testimonials, Final CTA)
Frontend - Navigation links work (Home, Pricing, Book Pickup, Track)
Frontend - Pricing page tabs functionality (Paper, Metal, Plastic, E-Waste, Others)
Frontend - Testimonials carousel navigation (prev/next buttons, dot navigation)
Frontend - Mobile menu toggle functionality
Frontend - Complete 5-step booking flow (Select scrap types, Enter weights, Pick date/time, Enter contact details, Review & Confirm)
Frontend - Booking confirmation with 8-character UUID ID generation
Frontend - Tracking page functionality with booking ID search
Frontend - Error handling for invalid booking IDs
Frontend - Impact stats API integration and display
Frontend - Responsive design elements
Integration - Frontend to backend API communication
Integration - Real-time booking creation and retrieval
Integration - Pricing data display from backend
Integration - Impact statistics real-time loading
